rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER KORBIN ET AL VS. JASON CHOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Condition Of Defendant Jason Chow
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 25, 2017, line 4. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER KOBRIN, NOEL VAN HARMONSON's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Condition Of Defendant Jason Chow DENIED. Plaintiffs failed to establish that will prevail on a claim for punitive damages, which is not asserted in the operative First Amended Complaint. Plaintiff's argument made in the unfiled reply that this motion should be granted based on yet properly made request for leave to amend under CCP 473 is not supported by any authority. Plaintiffs' December 9, 2016 cover letter does not meet the requirements of good faith "meet and confer." Defendant's requires to sanctions per CCP 2023.010(c)in the amount of $2,000 is granted to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS LP VS. LORETTA DAVIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Vacate Default Judgment; Proposed Reponse; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 25, 2017, line 8. DEFENDANT LORETTA DAVIS's Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Vacate Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to meet the burden under CCP 473(b). Plaintiff and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to comply with result in the motion being treated as unopposed. = (501/REQ)
